use tokio::io::AsyncWriteExt;
use tokio::net::TcpStream;

struct Connection {
    stream: TcpStream,
    buffer: Vec<u8>,
}

impl Connection {
    async fn shutdown(mut self) -> std::io::Result<()> {
        self.stream.write_all(b"QUIT\r\n").await?;
        self.stream.flush().await?;
        Ok(())
    }
}
